summary: Building and operating large-scale, AWS-native systems for live video streaming at global scale — on an orchestration team that manages thousands of live streams a day.
highlights: Build and operate distributed backend services on AWS (ECS, Lambda, event-driven pipelines), with infrastructure managed as code via AWS CDK.
Work on stream orchestration systems that coordinate thousands of live streams per day across a global audience.
Build LLM-powered internal tooling — including prompt management and safety/guardrail layers — to automate and accelerate engineering and operational workflows.
Develop services across the stack in TypeScript and Rust, emphasizing reliability and observability in the live-event path.
Work on experimentation and analytics tooling that informs product and operational decisions.

summary: Built and operated internal developer platform and observability tooling for engineering teams.
highlights: Stood up and maintained observability with Datadog (dashboards, monitors, SLOs) across services.
Built and maintained internal developer-platform and CI/CD tooling to streamline how engineering teams ship and operate services.
Improved service reliability through automation and operational tooling.
